# FoundationScout
> The most trusted directory for finding verified foundation repair contractors nationwide.

## About
FoundationScout connects homeowners with licensed, insured, and verified foundation repair contractors across all 50 US states.

## Services Covered
- Foundation Piering & Underpinning
- Slab Foundation Repair
- Basement Waterproofing
- Crawl Space Encapsulation & Repair
- Foundation Crack Repair
- House Leveling

## Key Facts
- 12,847+ verified contractors
- All 50 states covered
- Free quotes, no obligation
- Average contractor rating: 4.9/5

## Contact
Website: https://foundationscout.com
Email: support@foundationscout.com
